gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the apps in our ecosystem.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics and health checks in the community showcase.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot and Polly the bee acting as gardeners, checking on a digital greenhouse full of app-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot in a digital greenhouse. They are inspecting small glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot in a digital greenhouse. They are inspecting small glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
